flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Lansing Community College rose 207% between 2006 and 2009 (7.3% → 22.3%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Lansing Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Lansing Community College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 (63.7% → 70.2%).
